reviews.comment:
Muy limpios los baños, hay comida de verdad (no envasada) buena comida. Tiene mesas afuera.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are very clean, and the food is real (not packaged) and good. There are tables outside.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent fast food service, good quality and variety!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURydXVqUWtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una parada casi de rutina yendo a Pergamino o Venado. Muy buenos sándwiches hechos allí. La hamburguesa con queso es mi preferida. Tartas y otras minutas. Muy amables y buenos precios.
Se accede por la nueva autopista 8 en “área de servicios”.

(Translated by Google)
An almost routine stop on the way to Pergamino or Venado. They make very good sandwiches there. The cheeseburger is my favorite. They also serve pies and other snacks. Very friendly and good prices.
Access is via the new Highway 8 in the "service area."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNczZ5enBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El restaurante de ahí, la comida es rica, la atención del personal no es buena(no de todas, algunas dejan su trabajo y van hablar con los playeros) no les importa el cliente o atienden bien a sus conocidos, una pena. ACA pierde prestigio!!

(Translated by Google)
The food at the restaurant there is good, but the staff isn't very attentive (not all of them, some leave their posts to chat with the beachgoers). They don't seem to care about the customers or they only serve their friends. It's a shame. ACA is losing its reputation!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUbHZpeW5BRRAB
